question: The chart shows average student test scores over time on a 0–100 scale. What is the most appropriate description of the change during the period shown?

options.A: The scores fluctuated slightly but remained almost the same overall
options.B: There was a dramatic improvement in scores
options.C: The scores fell sharply over the period
options.D: The scores changed unpredictably from year to year

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (45.71–46.13) instead of a more informative 0–100 context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.42 over the period, which is modest in the full context.
